_meta.description: REAL capture, converted to DetectionEvent shapes. Do not hand-edit the events without updating this file's source pointers below.
_meta.video: iwW3qjvkFZE — ZGN channel, removed from YPP 04/2026, ~2.5 min (spike/RESULTS.md §2 row 7, 'special (high)')
_meta.note: RESULTS.md §3 finding 6: a channel removed from YouTube Partner Program for inauthentic content showed zero placements, contradicting the 'YouTube may serve ads on non-YPP channels anyway' assumption (n=1). Also incidentally the shortest fixture video (154s, well under the 8-minute midroll-eligibility threshold from SPEC §4.1/spike/RESULTS.md §4) — classify() itself applies no duration threshold (that inference is server-side), so this is not asserted as a distinct branch, just noted for context.
omittedFromExport: A second near-identical load/reload pair exists in the raw export at 2026-07-02T21:02:46.519Z / 21:02:50.898Z (same video, same result: adPlacements empty) — omitted as redundant duplicate evidence. No dom_ad_event records exist for this video in either load.

Fetch-path noise immediately following EACH 'initial' read (pageVideoId=iwW3qjvkFZE but a different/absent videoId), for both the kept load and the omitted duplicate reload: three records per load with videoId=null and note='no videoDetails' (malformed/prefetch reads with no videoDetails at all), one with videoId='ux' (2-character garbage from a non-canonical sibling endpoint — the /youtubei/v1/player/ad_break-class issue classifier.ts's summarizePlacementCounts doc comment describes), and one with an 11-character videoId that is an ad creative's OWN player response through the identical /youtubei/v1/player endpoint (hIrmRSR3K8b at 21:00:58.112Z for the kept load, DFQaUUPmLh6 at 21:02:46.740Z for the omitted duplicate reload). All real but exactly what the real pipeline drops: classify() and background.ts's handleIncomingEvent both filter on videoId !== pageVideoId (or a missing videoId) before an event would ever reach a session — omitted here for the identical reason, not fabricated absence.
conversionNotes: No BEACON events captured by the Phase 0 spike tool (see green-mrbeast-iYlODtkyw_I.json).
_meta.expectedClassification: playabilityStatus is 'OK' and all evidence is absent (no placements, no DOM, no beacon). With a valid, non-rewatch (fresh) observer -> NO_ADS, matching RESULTS.md's observed 'zero placements' for this special case.
